name: Anggrek Boho
signature: A 3D-shadowed macrame rope — complete with a hanging mustard tassel — knots itself into a divider between every section as it scrolls into view, drawn in with a genuine stroke-path animation rather than a simple fade. Couple photos sit inside a sunburst rattan-mirror frame, and a dip-dye gradient wash accents the cover and event cards.
brief: Free-spirited boho wedding elevated to desert-resort luxe (think Marrakech / Joshua Tree, not craft-fair boho) — 3D macrame with real depth, sunburst rattan framing, dip-dye gradient accents, hanging tassels, subtle linen texture. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
